top_signals.title: Ukrainian drones hit Russia’s largest oil refinery as Zelenskyy says Siberia now ‘within reach’
top_signals.summary: The attack underscores Kyiv's enhanced long-range drone capabilities and comes on the eve of a crucial NATO summit.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Trump says he became ‘a big crypto guy’ partly for politics
top_signals.summary: US President Donald Trump once called Bitcoin “a scam,” but admitted on Monday that he got involved in crypto “a little bit for politics.”
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Grayscale says Strategy’s recent bitcoin sales should restore confidence in its financing structure
top_signals.summary: "Strategy is selling more bitcoin. But this will restore confidence in its financing structure and help bitcoin find a more durable bottom."
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
